leads.title: Withings HFRN Retrospective Study
leads.summary: Withings is a French consumer electronics company headquartered in Issy-les-Moulineaux specializing in connected health devices, with strong clinical validation and a growing remote patient monitoring business for cardiology.
leads.pi: Pierre Escourrou, MD, PhD (Centre Interdisciplinaire du Sommeil, Paris, France)
leads.channel: Email to Jean-Baptiste Fontes (VP Business Development & Strategic Partnerships) with cc to Aline Criton (clinical contact on trial record)
leads.who: Jean-Baptiste Fontes, VP Business Development and Strategic Partnerships
leads.angle: Your heart failure retrospective study can leverage Mediogram's high-enrolling Eastern European cardiology sites with integrated imaging QC and regulatory expertise to accelerate real-world evidence generation across markets where Withings Health Solutions is expanding.
leads.opener: Hi Jean-Baptiste and Aline – We've followed Withings' clinical traction with remote monitoring devices and applaud your heart failure retrospective study. Mediogram runs high-enrolling cardiology trial sites across Eastern Europe with embedded imaging QC and local regulatory/ethics infrastructure. We'd welcome a brief call to discuss how our site network could strengthen your retrospective evidence or support future prospective cardiovascular studies. Best regards, Mediogram BD Team

leads.title: A Multi-site, Prospective, Non-interventional, Observational Data Collection Study in Patients Undergoing a Right Heart Catheterization
leads.summary: Acorai is developing a first-of-its-kind, scalable medical device for non-invasive intracardiac pressure monitoring to improve heart failure management, and they are actively scaling clinical studies with over 1,600 patients across 20 hospitals and 6 countries—they need sites and operational excellence for a not-yet-recruiting RHC observational study.
leads.channel: Direct email to Rita Peixoto + LinkedIn outreach to CEO Filip Peters
leads.who: Rita Peixoto (Study Contact); escalate to CEO Filip Peters or COO & Co-founder (title only available)
leads.angle: The CAPTURE-HF clinical study enrollment is complete, and funding will support completion of the study and regulatory submissions—this new RHC observational study appears to be a subsequent validation phase requiring high-enrolling Eastern Europe sites.
leads.opener: Rita, we work with high-enrolling cardiovascular trial sites across Eastern Europe (Minsk, regional expansion ready) and bring imaging QC, regulatory/ethics navigation, and logistics expertise. Your upcoming RHC catheterization observational study aligns perfectly with our network. We'd like to explore co-site partnerships to accelerate enrollment. Would a brief call work this month? —Mediogram

leads.title: Pivotal Trial to Evaluate the Safety and Effectiveness of the P&F TricValve® Transcatheter Bicaval Valve System
leads.summary: Private, founder-led European medtech company (Vienna HQ, unfunded) with proven bicaval tricuspid valve technology, 3,000+ patient experience globally, now launching first US pivotal trial—exactly what a high-enrolling CRO adds value to.
leads.channel: Direct outreach to tolender@productsandfeatures.com (listed trial contact) copied to CEO Katharina Kiss; phone follow-up within 48h
leads.who: Katharina Kiss, MD, CEO & Co-Founder; or trial-designated contact Thuy Olender (interim clinical liaison)
leads.angle: TRICAV II pivotal trial (just FDA-approved Dec 2025) needs Eastern European sites for cost-efficient, high-volume enrollment of tricuspid regurgitation patients—Mediogram's cardio network + regulatory expertise + FIH experience is ideal first-partner fit.
leads.opener: Hi Katharina & Thuy – Congratulations on TRICAV II FDA clearance. We've seen your 3,000-patient CE-mark experience and know severe TR enrollment is a bottleneck in the US. Mediogram runs dedicated cardio networks in Eastern Europe (RNPC Minsk), with institutional relationships, full regulatory/ethics management, and FIH-stage trial expertise. We'd like to explore co-sponsoring high-enrolling sites for TRICAV II. Can we grab 20 min next week? – Mediogram BD

leads.title: Single-arm, Multi-center Study Evaluating the Acceptance and Feasibility of a Digital Remote Monitoring Tool Configured for Patients With ATTR-CM: ACO-Monitor
Vsling™ III: Clinical Evaluation of the Vsling™ Device for Ventricular Repair in Patients with Heart Failure
conditions: HFrEF - Heart Failure with Reduced Ejection Fraction
leads.summary: Israeli-based transcatheter structural heart company developing the Vsling device for HFrEF patients; well-funded (€10M EIC grant/equity 2022) and actively enrolling in Vsling I trial—strong fit for multi-site Eastern European expansion.
leads.channel: Direct outreach to study contact Iris Yadin-Herling (iris.yh@cardiacsuccess.com, +972-546-633352) referencing CEO Boaz Manash
leads.who: Iris Yadin-Herling, Study Contact; escalate to Boaz Manash, CEO
leads.angle: Vsling III planning: Mediogram offers high-enrolling cardiology sites across Eastern Europe + local regulatory/ethics/imaging expertise to accelerate pivotal trial scale-up post-Vsling I.
leads.opener: Hi Iris & Boaz – Following Vsling I's early progress, Mediogram can add proven high-enrolling cardiology centers in Eastern Europe to Vsling III, managing local regulatory, ethics, imaging QC, and trial logistics. Our RNPC Cardiology (Minsk) and regional partners have scaled complex structural heart programs. Let's discuss how we accelerate your enrollment timeline. — Mediogram BD

leads.title: Globe Registry: Globe® Pulsed Field System Registry Study for Treating Patients With Symptomatic Atrial Fibrillation
leads.summary: Kardium is a Vancouver-based cardiovascular medtech company developing the Globe Pulsed Field System for atrial fibrillation treatment, recently FDA-approved with $250M in fresh capital and actively expanding its clinical and commercial operations globally.
leads.channel: Clinical Affairs email (Clinical.Affairs@kardium.com) escalated to Doug Goertzen (President/COO) or Stefan (Chief Commercial/Clinical Officer) via LinkedIn or industry event
leads.who: Doug Goertzen, President & Chief Operating Officer (or Stefan, VP Commercial/Clinical Affairs)
leads.angle: Globe Registry is the post-market evidence-generation play they need for Eastern European market penetration—Mediogram offers high-enrolling cardiology sites, embedded regulatory/ethics expertise, and imaging QC in the region where they're scaling.
leads.opener: Doug/Stefan—Kardium's Globe launch trajectory is exceptional. As you build commercial momentum post-FDA approval, Eastern Europe represents untapped volume with proven outcomes data demand. Mediogram runs high-enrolling CV sites across the region (RNPC Cardiology, Minsk and others) with embedded regulatory, ethics, and imaging QC. We'd like to discuss how we can accelerate Globe Registry enrollment and market readiness in your Eastern European strategy. —Mediogram BD

leads.title: Catheter Ablation Using a Novel Navigation and Imaging System
leads.summary: LUMA Vision develops an innovative 4D imaging and navigation end-to-end platform for cardiac applications backed by top-tier VCs; they're launching AFib ablation trials and need high-enrolling European sites with regulatory expertise.
leads.channel: Direct to Elke Sommerijns (existing study contact) + escalate to CEO/operations
leads.who: Fionn Lahart, CEO or clinical/ops lead (Elke Sommerijns appears to manage clinical programs based on trial authorship & ClinicalTrials.gov contact)
leads.angle: LUMA Vision achieved FDA clearance of VERAFEYE in April 2025 and is conducting the LUMINIZE first-in-human clinical study—your Minsk/Eastern Europe sites can accelerate multi-center enrollment and provide rapid local ethics/regulatory turnaround.
leads.opener: Hi Elke – Mediogram has scaled to high-enrolling cardiovascular sites across Eastern Europe (Minsk cardiology center, FIH specialists, embedded QC/ethics). With LUMINIZE rolling out, we can add 3–4 rapid-enrolling Afib ablation sites in your pipeline while handling all local regulatory and imaging workflows. Worth a 15-min call? — Mediogram BD

leads.title: Registry on Luma Vision's VERAFEYE System (ENLIgHT)
leads.summary: LUMA Vision is a Dublin-based medtech startup developing 4D cardiac imaging & navigation (VERAFEYE) for AF ablation and structural heart procedures, backed by Life Sciences Partners & well-funded for EU/US expansion.
leads.channel: Direct email to Elke Sommerijns (elke.sommerijns@lumavision.com); escalate to Fionn Lahart (CEO) via LinkedIn for a clinical operations partnership angle.
leads.who: Elke Sommerijns (Study Contact); escalate to Fionn Lahart (CEO/Co-Founder)
leads.angle: ENLIgHT registry is currently NOT_YET_RECRUITING—Mediogram can accelerate first-site activation in Eastern Europe with regulatory/ethics/QC/imaging support, leveraging existing RNPC Cardiology infrastructure in Minsk.
leads.opener: Hi Elke, Mediogram runs high-enrolling cardiovascular sites across Eastern Europe with dedicated regulatory, ethics, and imaging QC. We've followed VERAFEYE's clinical progress and see ENLIgHT as an ideal fit for rapid, compliant site activation in our region. Can we schedule a brief call to explore how we can support your registry launch? Best, [Your name], BD Lead – Mediogram

leads.title: Hummingbird ICE Study
conditions: ATRIAL APPENDAGE CLOSURE for ATRIAL FIBRILLATION
leads.summary: Philips is a diversified multinational medtech company with a specific focus on ICE (intracardiac echocardiography) technology for structural heart interventions, particularly atrial appendage closure, making them ideally suited for Eastern European early-access trials.
leads.channel: Direct email to Lucianno Mazzaro (existing contact) with cc to Christina Villar's office (Head of Global Clinical Operations) via LinkedIn or Philips main switchboard.
leads.who: Christina Villar, Head of Global Clinical Operations; escalate via Lucianno Mazzaro (MS, Study Contact)
leads.angle: Mediogram's established cardiology platform (RNPC Minsk), regulatory/ethics expertise, and proven high-enrollment Eastern European sites are critical assets for the Hummingbird ICE Study's clinical validation in atrial appendage closure—a procedure where geographic diversity and imaging QC rigor directly impact trial credibility.
leads.opener: Hi Lucianno, Mediogram has been tracking the Hummingbird ICE Study and would welcome an exploratory conversation about expanding enrollment into Eastern Europe. We operate RNPC Cardiology in Minsk (established AF/structural heart program), manage full regulatory/ethics pathways, and provide local imaging QC—solving two major constraints in international ICE trials. Would you have time for a brief call next week to explore fit? —Mediogram Business Development

leads.title: Parasternal Extravascular ICD System Pivotal Clinical Investigation (ALARION EV) Study
leads.summary: AtaCor Medical (founded 2014, Series D) is transforming cardiac rhythm management with innovative extravascular pacing and defibrillation solutions—a rapidly scaling device innovator with $75M in recent funding to run its pivotal ALARION EV trial.
leads.channel: Direct to trial operations contact (Sarah Hase, CCRA already on file) + escalation to Alan Marcovecchio (VP Clinical, Regulatory & Quality) for site network expansion discussion
leads.who: Alan Marcovecchio, Co-Founder & VP Clinical, Regulatory & Quality (primary); Sarah Hase, BS CCRA (trial operations lead on file)
leads.angle: AtaCor plans to launch the ALARION EV Pivotal Study in the United States and Europe in 2026—Mediogram can offer high-enrolling cardiology sites in Eastern Europe (Minsk) with integrated regulatory, ethics, imaging QC, and logistics to accelerate EU enrollment.
leads.opener: Hi Alan, we've followed AtaCor's impressive ALARION EV program and $75M funding close with great interest. Mediogram operates RNPC Cardiology in Minsk and high-enrolling CV sites across Eastern Europe with embedded regulatory, ethics, imaging QC, and trial logistics—capabilities that directly de-risk site activation and enrollment timelines for your 2026 pivotal launch. Would you have 20 min this week to explore how we might support your EU expansion? Best, Mediogram BD

leads.title: Cryoablation for Monomorphic Ventricular Tachycardia (VTS)
leads.summary: Adagio Medical develops Ultra-Low Temperature Cryoablation technology for cardiac arrhythmias, specifically focused on ventricular tachycardia treatment with the vCLAS catheter currently under FDA evaluation in the FULCRUM-VT pivotal study.
leads.channel: Deborah Kaster (Chief Business Officer) — direct outreach to dbkaster@adagiomedical.com or through Nabil Jubran (study contact) to escalate
leads.who: Deborah Kaster, Chief Business Officer and Chief Financial Officer (as of Sept 2025), oversees business development, corporate strategy and investor relations.
leads.angle: The FULCRUM-VT monomorphic VT study completed enrollment in October 2025 with 208 patients; Adagio needs multi-country clinical execution and site activation expertise to expand beyond US/Canada and accelerate PMA submission timelines.
leads.opener: Hi Deborah – Mediogram has been following Adagio's impressive FULCRUM-VT pivotal results with great interest. We specialize in accelerating device-trial enrollment in Eastern Europe (our Minsk cardiology site has high VT-ablation volumes and regulatory expertise) and believe we can meaningfully compress your timelines for both FULCRUM-VT expansion sites and post-approval commercial trials. Would welcome a brief conversation about how we might add value as you move toward FDA submission. – Mediogram BD

leads.title: VT Cryoablation System Post-Market Clinical Follow-up (PMCF) Study
leads.summary: Adagio Medical is a medical device company focused on developing and commercializing products for the treatment of cardiac arrhythmias utilizing its novel, proprietary, catheter-based Ultra-Low Temperature Cryoablation (UTLC) technology, and they fit because their vCLAS system is CE-marked and already operating PMCF studies in EU markets.
leads.channel: Direct outreach to Deborah Kaster (Chief Business Officer) via email (dkaster@adagiomedical.com) with executive summary; cc Nabil Jubran since he is named trial contact.
leads.who: Deborah Kaster, Chief Financial Officer and Chief Business Officer (oversees business development, corporate strategy, and investor relations)
leads.angle: Mediogram can accelerate Adagio's PMCF data collection in EU by adding high-enrolling VT ablation sites in Eastern Europe with owned regulatory/ethics/imaging QC infrastructure—extending their evidence package efficiently ahead of FDA PMA submission.
leads.opener:
Hi Deborah and Nabil,

We're Mediogram, a clinical-execution partner running high-enroll cardiovascular trials across Eastern Europe (cardiology CRO in Minsk, FIH/early-feasibility focus, we own regulatory, ethics, imaging QC, and logistics). We've identified your VT PMCF study and believe we can accelerate enrollment and data quality in markets where vCLAS is already CE-marked but underrepresented in your current site network. Would a brief call make sense to discuss adding 2–3 high-volume VT centers to your study?

Best,
Mediaogram BD

leads.title: Sympathetic Ablation for Ventricular Arrhythmias
leads.summary: SymKardia is a medical device company developing a catheter-based sympathetic ablation system for ventricular arrhythmias, led by experienced cardiac device executives.
leads.channel: Direct outreach to Bruce KenKnight (CEO) with copy to Imad Libbus (Chief Scientific Officer)
leads.who: Bruce KenKnight, PhD, Chief Executive Officer (or equivalent Clinical Operations lead if available)
leads.angle: Mediogram can de-risk early-stage enrollment via experienced Eastern European sites with proven VT patient access and imaging QC infrastructure for this novel pre-commercial device trial.
leads.opener: Bruce, we partner with high-enrolling cardiovascular sites across Eastern Europe (RNPC Cardiology Minsk, FIH specialists) with embedded regulatory and ethics expertise. For your sympathetic ablation VT program, we can accelerate site activation and patient screening while you focus on clinical development. Would you have 15 minutes next week? — Mediogram BD

leads.sponsor: Shanghai MicroPort EP MedTech Co., Ltd.
leads.title: Clinical Study on the Efficiency of Rapid Arrhythmia Mapping Using EasyStars™ High Density Mapping Catheter Applications
leads.summary: Shanghai MicroPort EP MedTech develops and markets devices and equipment for cardiac electrophysiological interventional therapy, backed by strategic investors including CPE (CITIC Private Equity), Grand Flight Investment, E Fund Management and Shanghai Pudong Kechuang Group, with their electrophysiology segment listed on Shanghai STAR Market (stock code 688351.SH).
leads.channel: Strategic partnership inquiry via investor relations / clinical development office; LinkedIn outreach to Chief Clinical Officer or VP Clinical Affairs
leads.who: VP Clinical Operations or Chief Clinical Officer (specific name not publicly available; recommend inquiry through investor relations or clinical.affairs contact)
leads.angle: EasyStars™ Mapping Catheter is praised for its excellent maneuverability in accessing small cardiac branches, and Mediogram's Eastern European RNPC Cardiology network offers rapid, high-enrolling sites with integrated regulatory/ethics expertise to accelerate this VT/AF/AFL mapping study.
leads.opener: Shanghai MicroPort EP's EasyStars™ represents a differentiated mapping solution in a high-unmet-need space. We at Mediogram—with FIH/early-feasibility expertise and our established Minsk cardiology center (RNPC Cardiology) plus integrated regulatory and imaging QC—can rapidly activate 8–12 high-enrolling Eastern European sites for your efficiency/feasibility trial. Let's discuss how we can compress your enrollment timeline while maintaining clinical rigor. — Mediogram Clinical Execution

leads.sponsor: Shanghai MicroPort EP MedTech Co., Ltd.
leads.title: Clinical Study on the Safety and Efficacy of a New Magnetic Navigation Radiofrequency Ablation Catheter for Rapid Arrhythmia
leads.summary: MicroPort EP is a Shanghai-based electrophysiology device company ($4.8B valuation, backed by CPE/E Fund) specializing in ablation catheters and 3D navigation systems—a strategic fit for your Eastern European trial expansion and clinical credibility.
leads.pi: Gao Henggan (Ruijin-Hainan Hospital Shanghai Jiao Tong University School Of Medicine)
leads.channel: Direct email to Qi NA Jin (their trial contact at Ruijin Hospital) referencing Dr. Yiyong Sun's published international expansion strategy, with copy to ep.microport.com medical affairs.
leads.who: Dr. Yiyong Sun, President, MicroPort EP (or Chief Clinical/Regulatory Officer via their clinical trials office)
leads.angle: Magnetic navigation RF ablation for rapid arrhythmia aligns with MicroPort EP's Columbus® 3D navigation platform—offer Mediogram's RNPC Cardiology (Minsk) as proven FIH site with local regulatory/imaging QC infrastructure to accelerate their European market entry beyond current limited presence.
leads.opener: Dr. Sun—We've reviewed MicroPort EP's magnetic navigation technology and your international ambitions (Europe, Southeast Asia). Mediogram runs high-enrolling cardiovascular and advanced-therapy sites in Eastern Europe with in-house regulatory, ethics, and imaging expertise. We'd welcome a brief discussion about potentially partnering on your new magnetic RF ablation catheter trial to establish credibility in underserved markets. Would you be open to a 20-minute call? —Mediogram BD
